zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Maunsell於大約1458年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根斯萬希亞時，她的父親Sir Philip de Maunsell39歲，母親Mabel ferch Gruffud38歲。她於1477年與Sir Mathew Cradock在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1502年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根斯萬希亞享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maunsell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mansell
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Old French mansel ‘inhabitant of Le Mans or the surrounding area of Maine’. The place was originally named in Latin (ad) Ceromannos, from the name of the Gaulish tribe living there, the Ceromanni. The name was shortened to Celmans and then became Le Mans as a result of the mistaken identification of the first syllable with the Old French demonstrative adjective.
status name for a particular type of feudal tenant, Anglo-Norman French mansel, one who occupied a manse (from Late Latin mansa ‘dwelling’), a measure of land sufficient to support one family.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Maunsell was born about 1458, in Swansea, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Sir Philip de Maunsell, was 39 and her mother, Mabel ferch Gruffud, was 38. She married Sir Mathew Cradock in 1477, in Gwyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died about 1502, in Swansea, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Maunsell est née environ 1458, à Swansea, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Sir Philip de Maunsell, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mabel ferch Gruffud, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Mathew Cradock en 1477, à Gwyr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1502, à Swansea, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Maunsell um 1458 in Swansea, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Philip de Maunsell 39 und ihre Mutter Mabel ferch Gruffud 38. Sie hat 1477 in Gwyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Sir Mathew Cradock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1502 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Swansea, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Maunsell(이)가 대략 1458년 웨일스 글램르건 스완시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Philip de Maunsell(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel ferch Gruffud(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1477년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 그w이르에서 Sir Mathew Cradock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1502년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 스완시에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Maunsell родилась около 1458 г. в местности свансеа, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Sir Philip de Maunsell было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel ferch Gruffud, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Mathew Cradock в 1477 г. в местности гвир, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла около 1502 г. в местности свансеа, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.
